recent_trades.summary: Adding to UNH on positive Medicare Advantage payment catalyst (+2.48% hike for 2027) with strong positive sentiment score of +0.34.

Current weight is only 3.9%, and this is a defensive healthcare name that should benefit in uncertain macro environments. Price is mid-range in its 30-day band with room to run toward the 310 high.

Position is down -1.15%. Consumer discretionary faces headwinds from record-low consumer sentiment. Freeing capital for better opportunities.

recent_trades.summary: Increasing UNH weight to 15% on very positive Medicare Advantage news and oversold technicals, confidence 9/10.

recent_trades.summary: Overweighting Costco to 15% as a reliable defensive staples play against crashing consumer sentiment.
recent_trades.reasoning: With consumer sentiment at record lows, investors historically rotate into reliable consumer staples. Costco's strong wholesale model and positive earnings expectations make it an ideal safe haven to allocate capital right now.

recent_trades.summary: Increasing UnitedHealth weight to 15% following the highly favorable 2.48% Medicare Advantage payment hike.
recent_trades.reasoning: UNH has a massive fundamental catalyst with the recently finalized Medicare Advantage payment update for 2027. In a risk-off, negative-sentiment market, this provides excellent defensive growth and earnings visibility, making it a prime overweight target.

recent_trades.summary: Trimming Exxon Mobil exposure as reports suggest the US will extend Russian oil waivers to suppress crude prices.
recent_trades.reasoning: The news that the US will likely extend Russian oil waivers to temper the 'Iran war shock' will likely cap near-term oil upside. Trimming our position by half to lock in capital for our defensive rotation.

recent_trades.summary: Exiting Apple completely as US consumer sentiment dives to a record low, signaling major headwinds for premium consumer hardware.
recent_trades.reasoning: With macroeconomic data showing consumer sentiment hitting record lows amid global conflict fears, discretionary hardware sales are highly vulnerable. Selling the entire position to raise cash and rotate into defensive sectors.

recent_trades.summary: Adding modestly to UNH on supportive Medicare Advantage news and improving relative sentiment, confidence 7/10.
recent_trades.reasoning: UNH has one of the stronger fundamental/news backdrops today thanks to the Medicare Advantage payment update, and the stock is acting steadier than much of the market. I am only sizing to 8% because the chart is not a breakout, but the headline catalyst improves downside support and diversifies the portfolio away from mega-cap tech.

recent_trades.summary: Exiting the small MSFT position because software sentiment is soft and the chart remains range-bound to down, confidence 6/10.

The stock is near the bottom of its recent range and lacks clear momentum, making it a reasonable source of cash without materially changing overall portfolio exposure.

recent_trades.summary: Trimming GOOGL as the stock sits near the low end of its 30-day range despite positive news, confidence 7/10.

With the market tone negative, I want to reduce exposure to a name showing poor price confirmation and free capacity for stronger setups later.

recent_trades.summary: Increasing UNH position from 3.9% to 9% on strong positive catalyst: Trump administration finalizing 2.48% Medicare Advantage payment hike, boosting insurer stocks.

Increasing to near-max weight represents a high-conviction defensive healthcare play in a volatile macro environment.

universe.description: Default 20-name universe: mega-cap leaders across all major sectors. Liquid, well-covered, large-cap U.S. equities.
